title: Refactor change workflows to signal-driven state-holder architecture

tasks.title: M0/T01: Spike workflow scaffold. Create one signal-driven change workflow with 5-10 representative signal handlers (e.g. proposalUpdated, taskAdded, gateCompleted, gateInProgress, archiveRequested) and 3-4 representative queries (getState, getTasks, getGateStatus) in `plugin/src/temporal/spike/`. Wire to a temporary spike worker on a separate task queue (`advance-spike`). Goal: minimal validation harness for SC1/SC10. RED: write a spike test that starts the workflow, fires one signal, queries state. GREEN: scaffold passes. Defer integration with main worker until M2.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added spike contracts, signal/query definitions, workflow handlers, and a Temporal test that starts spikeChangeWorkflow, fires proposal/task/gate/archive signals, and queries state/tasks/gate status. Also checkpoint included prior design-doc amendment already present in worktree.
tasks.completed_by: T01 complete. Spike workflow scaffold created under plugin/src/temporal/spike with representative signal/query surface and Temporal worker test.

tasks.title: M0/T02: Spike — concurrent signaling test (SC1 verification). Spawn 3 client agents that each fire 50 signals to the same spike workflow over a short window. Validate: zero `Workflow Update failed` errors, all 150 signals applied (workflow state reflects all mutations), no signal lost. Use Temporal test environment for deterministic timing. This is the core SC1 acceptance test.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added a focused spike test that starts one workflow, fires 150 concurrent taskAdded signals from 3 simulated clients, verifies no signal failures, validates 150 stored tasks and unique IDs. Checkpoint f6c24e52980389e1e8e95c80112a9b8a25a1dcd0 recorded.
tasks.completed_by: T02 complete. Spike concurrent signaling verification added and passed.

tasks.title: M0/T03: Spike — continueAsNew test (SC10 part a). Drive spike workflow past 5,000 events via signal flooding. Verify: `info.continueAsNewSuggested` triggers CAN, `allHandlersFinished()` gate respected, in-flight signals preserved across CAN, queryable state survives, history is bounded. Validate both defensive triggers (historyLength threshold + continueAsNewSuggested).
tasks.implementation_summary: Added seed-state carry-forward, configurable history threshold, signal counting, continue-as-new count, `workflowInfo().continueAsNewSuggested || historyLength > threshold` trigger, and `wf.allHandlersFinished` drain before `continueAsNew`. Added test that floods 120 signals, waits for CAN, and verifies state/tasks survive. Checkpoint 4fd69a1a8737ac7146d920b4d2dabb50d5e04c46 recorded.
tasks.completed_by: T03 complete. Continue-as-new spike path implemented and verified with signal flooding.

tasks.title: M0/T04: Spike — disk projection cadence + conformance read routing (SC4 verification). Implement `writeChangeProjectionActivity` triggered only on gateCompleted/gateAwaitingApproval/gateStuck/archiveRequested/changeCancelled signals. Wire `adv_conformance action: 'run'` POC to read via workflow query (strongly consistent), not projection. Validate: ≤10 disk writes per representative spike change lifetime; conformance verdict cannot race a pending signal; external readers tolerate file absence + validate schemaVersion.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added projection-trigger signals (`gateAwaitingApproval`, `gateStuck`, `changeCancelled`), conformance verdict signal/query, spike projection activity contract, and projection writes for gate/terminal signals only. Test verifies conformance reads via workflow query before any projection, exactly 5 projection writes for gate/terminal signals, schemaVersion 2 projection payloads, and ≤10 writes. Checkpoint 8fda26fe50ab0a965bf1c3af8f5521d79bdbc511 recorded.

attempts.error: T04 test expected projectionWrites=5 immediately after fire-and-forget signals; got 1 because async signal handler activities had not all completed before query.
attempts.diagnosis: Temporal signal delivery is fire-and-forget; handler activities/projection side effects need query/poll barrier before assertions.
attempts.fix_tried: Updated test to poll getStateQuery until projectionWrites reaches expected count before asserting projection array.

tasks.completed_by: T04 complete. Projection cadence and conformance query routing verified.

tasks.title: M0/T05: Spike — one-shot migration script POC + marker barrier (SC10 part b). Pick one current active change (suggest `cleanupzombierunningworkflows` — 0 tasks, smallest). Read its disk JSON, replay as gate-batched signals into the spike workflow, fire `migrationMarkerSignal`, poll `getProcessedMarkersQuery` until marker seen. Verify round-trip: source state → replay → workflow query state must match. Validates V4 marker barrier strategy for cross-name signal ordering.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added spike migration replay helper, migrationMarkerSignal, getProcessedMarkersQuery, and workflow marker storage. Test replays a cleanupzombierunningworkflows-style source state into spike workflow, polls marker query until processed, and verifies round-trip state (title, proposal text, 0 tasks, pending gates). Checkpoint ab58e0ac453341dd408b78bef55d457713d73f0d recorded.
tasks.completed_by: T05 complete. Migration replay POC and marker barrier verified. Source inspection used adv_change_show for cleanupzombierunningworkflows (0 tasks, all gates pending), not direct ADV state-file reads.

tasks.title: M0/T06: Spike report. Synthesize results from T02-T05 into a written kill-criteria report at `docs/decisions/2026-05-04-spike-report.md`. PASS criteria: SC1 zero Workflow Update failed; SC10a CAN preserves state; SC4 conformance routing works; SC10b migration POC round-trips. Any FAIL → halt change for re-design via `adv_change_reenter` from design gate. PASS → unblocks M1.
tasks.implementation_summary: Created docs/decisions/2026-05-04-spike-report.md documenting PASS for SC1 concurrent signaling, SC10a continue-as-new, SC4 conformance routing/projection cadence, and SC10b migration replay. Included verification commands/results and noted the ADV-safe deviation from direct disk JSON reads. Checkpoint 06fdb3a4e4ac6f1a0222b11bf6f40c6392c83902 recorded.
tasks.completed_by: T06 complete. M0 spike report records PASS and explicitly allows proceeding to M1; no redesign/re-entry needed.

tasks.title: M1/T07: Capture LOC baseline for SC8 verification. Run `wc -l plugin/src/temporal/**/*.ts` and `wc -l plugin/src/tools/{change-diagnose,archive-sweep,mesh-scan,task-run-status,task-tdd,task-evidence,change-import,migrate-cleanup}.ts` (where files exist). Record baseline counts in `docs/decisions/2026-05-04-loc-baseline.md`. This snapshot is the SC8 ≥30% reduction reference.

Required SC8 reduction: ≥5,589 temporal LOC, post-change temporal LOC ≤13,041. Checkpoint b44cf3988e7a8dec3bfd79886d48ba76362007db recorded.
tasks.completed_by: T07 complete. LOC baseline captured for SC8.

tasks.title: M2/T10: Define 24 signals + 6 queries in `plugin/src/temporal/messages.ts`. Per Design Section 1: 5 doc/metadata signals (proposalUpdated, problemStatementUpdated, agreementUpdated, designUpdated, acceptanceCriteriaSet); 7 task lifecycle (taskAdded, taskUpdated, taskRemoved, taskAssigned, taskCompleted with verification field, taskBlocked, taskCancelled); 5 gate state (gateInProgress, gateAwaitingApproval, gateStuck, gateCompleted, gateReentered); 2 wisdom/reflection; 2 worktree (worktreeCreated, worktreeDeleted); 3 conformance (locked, verdict, overridden); 2 lifecycle (archiveRequested, changeCancelled). Plus retained applyChangeSummarySignal. 6 queries: getState, getTasks, getGateStatus, getWorktrees, getConformanceState, getProcessedMarkers. Each with Zod payload schema. RED: write empty signal definitions test asserting count + schema validity; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented M2/T10 signal/query contract: 27 primary signal bindings (24-task wording enumerates 26 new + retained applyChangeSummary, excluding temporary migrationMarker) and six design query bindings. Added schema/sample validation coverage in plugin/src/temporal/messages.test.ts. Verification passed: pnpm run typecheck; pnpm exec vitest run src/temporal/messages.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.test.ts.
tasks.completed_by: T10 complete. Added RED/GREEN message contract test, narrowed primary change query names to six design queries, added signal/query bindings for getState/getTasks/getGateStatus/getWorktrees/getConformanceState/getProcessedMarkers, retained compatibility query names separately, and wired workflow handlers for new design query bindings. Checkpoint 6ae5d28 recorded.

tasks.title: M2/T11: Implement signal handlers + query handlers in `plugin/src/temporal/workflows.ts`. Each handler is a pure mutation on `state`. Special: `gateReenteredSignal` handler computes downstream gate set from fromGateId and resets atomically (rq-scopeReentry02 cascade). On terminal signals (archiveRequested, changeCancelled), schedule `archiveChangeActivity` then complete workflow. CAN trigger: after handler completes AND `allHandlersFinished()`, check `historyLength > 5000 || info.continueAsNewSuggested` → continueAsNew. Adhere to workflow-bundle boundary (no storage/, tools/, node:* imports). RED: handler unit tests for each signal asserting state mutation; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Completed M2/T11 workflow handler/query validation. Added a RED regression asserting changeWorkflow drains in-flight handlers before continue-as-new. GREEN added `await wf.condition(wf.allHandlersFinished)` before `wf.continueAsNew`. Verified workflow handler/query suites, message contract, workflow bundle boundary, and typecheck.
tasks.completed_by: T11 complete. Existing workflow signal/query handlers covered all primary signal categories; added regression coverage for continue-as-new drain ordering and fixed changeWorkflow to await wf.allHandlersFinished immediately before continueAsNew. Checkpoint 49692eb recorded.

tasks.title: M2/T12: Implement bucket derivation in `plugin/src/utils/buckets.ts`. Pure function `deriveBucket(ctx: BucketContext) → Bucket` per Design Section 2. 7-rule precedence: pendingCheckpoint OR gate awaiting_approval → awaiting_approval; all non-release done + release awaiting → ready_to_archive; gate stuck → stuck; gate in_progress + idle past threshold (default 24h) → drifting; gate in_progress → in_flight; only proposal done + age > threshold → never_started; default → in_flight. Mutually exclusive. RED: unit test for each precedence rule; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented bucket derivation fix for design precedence: `pendingCheckpoint` returns `awaiting_approval`; all non-release gates done plus release awaiting approval returns `ready_to_archive`; other awaiting gates return `awaiting_approval`. Verification passed: typecheck plus buckets, workflow queries, and search-attribute tests.
tasks.completed_by: T12 complete. Added RED coverage for actual release-awaiting context and fixed deriveBucket precedence so release awaiting approval maps to ready_to_archive while pendingCheckpoint still wins. Checkpoint b0acb94 recorded.

tasks.title: M2/T13: Refactor `plugin/src/temporal/change-state.ts` to pure mutation functions (no Temporal imports, no I/O). Functions like `applyTaskAddedToState(state, payload)`, `applyGateCompletedToState(state, payload)`, etc. — one per signal. Remove dual-write logic, idempotency-key bookkeeping, and any update-validator residue. State shape: change metadata + tasks + gates + worktrees + conformance + lastSignalAt. RED: per-mutation unit tests; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented T13 pure mutation cleanup for change-state. Added focused unit tests for purity imports, task lifecycle mutation without task-run ledger state, and tool-layer gate enforcement boundary. Removed `canCompleteGate` usage/import from `completeGateInChangeState`. Verification passed: typecheck plus change-state, workflow handlers, workflow queries, and bundle-boundary tests.
tasks.completed_by: T13 complete. Added change-state pure mutation tests, removed sequential gate validation from change-state so validation stays in tool layer, and verified no Temporal/storage/tools/node imports. Checkpoint 2fc26e7 recorded.

tasks.title: M2/T14: Implement tool adapter helpers in `plugin/src/tools/_adapters.ts`. Functions per Design Section 6: `fireSignal(changeId, signal, payload)` (fire-and-forget, ~15 callers), `querySignal(changeId, query, ...args)` (sync, ~12 callers), `fireSignalAndQuery(...)` (eventual fresh state, ~3 callers), `startChangeWorkflow(input)` (only for adv_change_create). All adapters resolve workflow handle via shared service-layer (STSL). RED: per-adapter unit tests with mocked Temporal client; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented T14 adapter helper expansion: `fireSignal`, `querySignal`, and `fireSignalAndQuery` overloads now accept either a workflow handle or `TemporalStoreBackendInput + changeId`, resolving guarded handles through `getGuardedChangeHandle`. Added tests for guarded handle resolution and signal/query sequencing. Verification passed: typecheck plus adapters, task, and gate tests.
tasks.completed_by: T14 complete. Adapter helpers now support both existing handle-first calls and store-input/changeId calls that resolve guarded workflow handles through STSL shared helpers. Checkpoint 7ba4509 recorded.

tasks.title: M2/T15: Add Temporal search attributes per Design Section 7. Existing 9 (`AdvChangeId`, `AdvChangeStatus`, `AdvChangeTitle` Keyword, `AdvAffectedProjects` KeywordList, `AdvAffectedPaths` KeywordList, `AdvCurrentGate`, `AdvCurrentBucket`, `AdvLastSignalAt`, `AdvCreatedAt`) + 2 new from V6 A2 (`AdvWorktreeBranches` KeywordList, `AdvWorktreePaths` KeywordList). Update `adv_temporal_register_search_attributes` migration code. Workflow updates search attributes atomically when worktreeCreated/Deleted signals process. Sort client-side per V3 fix. RED: registration test asserts all 11 attributes registered; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented T15 Temporal search attributes: `ADV_SEARCH_ATTRIBUTES` now includes 11 attributes; `buildChangeSearchAttributes` emits sorted active `AdvWorktreeBranches` and `AdvWorktreePaths`; observability registration helpers now register/verify the 11 signal-driven attributes used by `adv_temporal_register_search_attributes`. Verification passed: typecheck plus search-attributes, workflows.search-attrs, and observability tests.

tasks.title: M3/T18: Cross-cutting continueAsNew test (SC10 part a). Drive full workflow past 5,000 events. Validate: CAN at threshold, in-flight signals preserved, queryable state survives, history bounded, both triggers (historyLength + continueAsNewSuggested) work.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added a real changeWorkflow continue-as-new integration test that floods 5,200 taskAdded signals, verifies all in-flight signal state survives into the new run, confirms run ID rotation, and asserts bounded post-CAN history. Added a pure trigger helper to cover both `continueAsNewSuggested` and explicit `historyLength >= threshold` paths; aligned default change CAN threshold with the 5,000-event design. Verified with focused vitest, typecheck, and Prettier check. Checkpoint 958f730.

tasks.title: M3/T19: Cross-cutting cross-name signal-ordering test. Validate: signals of same name arrive in order; signals across different names may interleave but the gate-batched-replay marker barrier strategy (Section 8 V4 fix) deterministically serializes batches. Test scenarios: (a) taskAdded × N + gateCompleted; (b) marker-signal-then-query polling completes; (c) replay determinism across CAN.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added signal-ordering integration coverage for same-name taskAdded ordering, marker barriers between task and gate replay batches, and processed-marker preservation across continue-as-new. Persisted migration marker query state through ChangeWorkflowInput during CAN and used the current run ID for post-CAN marker signaling. Verified focused vitest, typecheck, and Prettier check. Checkpoint 47c41c9.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial post-CAN marker wait targeted a runless handle and timed out after the original run had continued-as-new.

attempts.error: Focused signal-ordering test timed out in post-CAN marker wait; Temporal logged `workflow execution already completed`.
attempts.diagnosis: After CAN, signaling through a runless handle can target the completed first run in this SDK path; the marker must be sent to the current run ID returned by describe.
attempts.fix_tried: Describe latest run after CAN, create a handle with that runId, then send/poll the post-CAN marker on the current-run handle.

tasks.completed_by: T19 complete. Signal-ordering and marker-barrier integration verification passed; checkpoint 47c41c9.

tasks.title: M4/T20: Refactor `plugin/src/tools/change.ts`, `task.ts`, `gate.ts`, `wisdom.ts` to signal-fire pattern. For each tool: replace update calls with `fireSignal` (mutations) or `querySignal` (reads). `gate.ts` adds V6 enforcement: query gate state before fire (sequential gate `rq-gatemodel01.1`); for gateId='execution', query tasks before fire (task completeness `rq-gatemodel01.4`). `task.ts` collapses TDD ceremony: drop separate red/green/checkpoint orchestration, the single taskCompletedSignal carries verification text. RED: per-tool integration test with mocked workflow handle; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Refactored T20 tool paths so task completion uses `taskCompletedSignal` with verification/summary, gate status/completion reads workflow gate state via `getGateStatusQuery`, and execution gate checks workflow tasks via `changeTasksQuery` before firing `gateCompletedSignal`. Added failing-then-passing tests for task completion signal routing and gate workflow-query enforcement. Verified change/task/gate/wisdom focused tests, typecheck, and formatting. Checkpoint dd5b07b.

tasks.title: M5/T24: Implement one-shot migration script `plugin/scripts/migrate-to-signal-architecture.ts`. Algorithm per Design Section 8: read each `~/.local/share/opencode/plugins/advance/{pid}/changes/{id}/` directory; for each change.json, start a fresh signal-driven workflow with the change-id; replay (a) tasks via taskAdded signals batch, (b) marker barrier wait, (c) gate completions in order via gateCompleted signals batch, (d) marker barrier per gate. Verify state via getStateQuery == source state (round-trip check). Support `--dry-run` (no signals fired, just validate readability) and `--execute` (fire signals). Surface diff for any mismatch. RED: write test using `cleanupzombierunningworkflows` change as fixture; GREEN: implement.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented one-shot migration script `plugin/scripts/migrate-to-signal-architecture.ts` per Design Section 8. Reads each `~/.local/share/opencode/plugins/advance/{pid}/changes/{id}/` directory; `--dry-run` builds replay plan from `migration-replay.ts` (proposalUpdated/problemStatementUpdated/agreementUpdated/designUpdated → marker:docs → taskAdded/taskAssigned/taskBlocked/taskCompleted/taskCancelled per task → marker:tasks → gateInProgress/gateAwaitingApproval/gateStuck/gateCompleted per gate with marker barrier per gate → wisdomAdded → marker:wisdom → marker:final). `--execute` mode starts a fresh signal-driven changeWorkflow with TERMINATE_EXISTING policy, fires the plan via `replayChangeAsSignals`, and runs `validateMigrationRoundTrip` against `changeStateQuery` for source-vs-replayed task counts/status/gate-state/wisdom/documents. Added `scripts/migrate-to-signal-architecture.test.ts` with cleanupzombierunningworkflows-style fixture verifying dry-run plan via exposed `loadChangeDir`/`dryRunChange`. Verified post-restart: 3 test files pass; cleanupzombierunningworkflows real dry-run reports 13 plan steps (2 signal, 11 marker); pnpm run check (typecheck + isolation + lint + format) passes. Commit cafa358b1cbb777893acee2cb9bb6c88208c4817.

wisdom.content: Temporal spike workflows can live in `plugin/src/temporal/spike/` with colocated `contracts.ts`, `messages.ts`, and `workflows.ts`; a focused test can use `Worker.create({ workflowsPath: fileURLToPath(new URL('./workflows.ts', import.meta.url)), taskQueue })` plus `withTestWorkflowEnvironment` to validate signal/query behavior without touching the main worker.

Temporal signal client calls are fire-and-forget; `handle.signal(...)` resolving does not mean async signal-handler activities (e.g. projection writes) have completed. Tests and migration barriers must query/poll workflow state (or marker query) for the processed condition before asserting projection/side effects.

Design prose said "24 signals" but the enumerated surface is 26 new signals plus retained `applyChangeSummarySignal` (27 primary bindings), with `migrationMarkerSignal` treated as a temporary migration-only signal outside the primary contract count. Contract tests should encode the enumerated keys, not the stale prose count.

For signal-driven change workflows, `wf.condition(() => shouldContinueAsNew(...))` can unblock while handlers are still in flight; always call `await wf.condition(wf.allHandlersFinished)` immediately before `wf.continueAsNew(...)` so the seed captures completed handler mutations.

Bucket precedence must treat `release` awaiting approval specially: in actual `bucketCtxFromState`, release awaiting approval also makes `currentGateStatus === 'awaiting_approval'`. Put `ready_to_archive` before generic awaiting-gate handling, while leaving `pendingCheckpoint` as the highest precedence.

Keep `change-state.ts` as pure workflow-safe mutation code: no Temporal SDK, storage, tools, or node imports; boundary/protocol validation such as sequential gate checks belongs in tool adapters, while state helpers only apply already-validated mutations.

Adapter helpers can preserve existing handle-first call sites while enabling signal-driven store-input usage via overloads: accept either `WorkflowHandleLike` or `TemporalStoreBackendInput + changeId`, resolve through `getGuardedChangeHandle`, then route through the same `runTemporal` / `runTemporalQuery` wrappers.

Real `changeWorkflow` concurrent-signaling SC1 verification is covered by `plugin/src/temporal/__tests__/concurrent-signaling.itest.ts`: seed task-add signals first, poll query state as barrier, then fire 120 mixed signals concurrently; assert zero rejections, 150 total signals, converged task/gate/wisdom/document state, and RUNNING workflow status.

For the real `changeWorkflow` CAN test, one task-added signal roughly added one history event in Temporal test env; 3,000 signals only reached `historyLength=3013`. Use >5,000 signals (5,200 worked) to validate the 5,000-event threshold and run-ID rotation.

After a workflow continues-as-new, use a handle bound to the latest `description.runId` for post-CAN marker signals. In the TS SDK test path, a runless handle can still route `signal(...)` to the completed first run, causing `workflow execution already completed` and marker-poll timeouts.

Gate tools should enforce V6 against workflow-query state, not stale disk projections: query `getGateStatusQuery` before sequence checks, and query `changeTasksQuery` before completing execution. Disk change data remains useful for context snapshots/readiness only.

During the T21 transition, live `adv_run_test` can fail with `WorkflowUpdateFailedError` after source refactors to the same tool surface because OpenCode uses cached plugin dist/tool code in-session. Verify with bash fallback and attach `adv_task_evidence`; full live-tool behavior needs build + fresh session.

Cross-change worktree branch ownership can be checked through Temporal Visibility before any git mutation: query `AdvAffectedProjects = "{projectId}" AND AdvWorktreeBranches = "{branch}" AND AdvChangeStatus = "active"`, filter `adv/change/{projectId}/` workflow IDs, and exclude the current change ID.

M4 build gate passed after signal-driven workflow/tool refactors: `pnpm exec vitest run src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts && pnpm run build` generated `dist/index.js` plus `dist/temporal/worker.js` and `dist/temporal/workflows.js` without dirtying the worktree.

T24 exposed a live-session checkpoint ledger gap: git checkpoint can commit successfully while `adv_task_checkpoint` returns `checkpointRecorded:false` with `Workflow Update failed`; do not mark task done. Fresh OpenCode restart is required, then retry clean checkpoint at committed HEAD before closing the task/change.
